calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Charitable Disposition Under Trust Based On Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Modify Charitable Disposition Under Trust Based On Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Continued To Feb-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Modify Charitable Disposition Under Trust Based On Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Continued To Jan-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Constance Liu for (petitioner) Community Music Center with Patricia Lee & Denise Wells present. Scott Chan for The State of California.

The Court stated that this is a petition to modify a charitable trust, that the issues are venue and the merits of the request and that the trustee is out of state. Ms. Liu reported that the trustee travels to San Francisco, that she does the accounts here and that there is property here. The Court asked if the trustee actually comes here to administer the trust. Ms. Liu replied yes and that she will be requesting reimbursement of travel expenses. The Court stated that the objections raised good points, that if the desire is to promote Viola should they recruit more Viola players or provide scholarships for something close to the Viola and that in regards to the trustor's not anticipating the increased value of their real property it is not impressed by the trustee's evidence. Ms. Liu stated that most individuals do not talk about their estate plan and that the building construction will help as there will be a designated room for string instruments. Mr. Chan stated that they have put everything in their papers. Ms. Liu stated that there are $100 gifts to individuals. The Court stated that it over reaches and fails to do the best that can be done to meet the trustors desires and that they can amend their petition to come up with a plan that is closer to what is requested. Ms. Liu stated that they want the money used for the public good and that they are open to amending the petition to include other instruments. The Court instructed counsel to work with Mr. Chan to come up with something that everyone can agree on and that they will need to file an amendment. Ms. Lee stated that Mr. Steinmetz wanted to encourage Viola playing and by enabling more string players it will encourage more Viola players. The Petition to Modify Charitable Disposition Under Trust Based on Changed Circumstances was continued to January 31, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to file an amended petition and for a declaration from the trustee as to where she does the administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition To Modify Charitable Disposition Under Trust Based On Changed Circumstances
